title: A Maturity Model for Practical Explainability in Artificial Intelligence-Based Applications: Integrating Analysis and Evaluation (MM4XAI-AE) Models
description_es: Este artículo presenta MM4XAI-AE, un modelo de madurez para evaluar y caracterizar el nivel de implementación de explicabilidad en aplicaciones de IA, con indicadores binarios evaluados mediante revisión de documentación.
abstract: As AI systems become more prevalent in critical applications, the need for practical explainability assessment grows. This paper presents MM4XAI-AE, a maturity model that integrates Analysis and Evaluation approaches for characterizing explainability in AI-based applications. The model uses binary indicators assessed through documentation review, making it well-suited for retrospective audits and compliance verification.

citations.apa: Muñoz-Ordóñez, J., Cobos, C., Vidal-Rojas, J. C., & Herrera, F. (2025). A Maturity Model for Practical Explainability in Artificial Intelligence-Based Applications: Integrating Analysis and Evaluation (MM4XAI-AE) Models. International Journal of Intelligent Systems, 2025(1), 4934696.
